properties.name: app.aws.region
properties.description: AWS region used by ClipCurator services.

properties.name: app.aws.s3.bucket
properties.description: S3 bucket used for ClipCurator uploads and derived assets.

properties.name: app.huggingface.api-token
properties.description: Hugging Face API token used for Whisper and CLIP calls.

properties.name: app.huggingface.whisper-url
properties.description: Hugging Face Whisper inference endpoint URL.

properties.name: app.huggingface.clip-url
properties.description: Hugging Face CLIP inference endpoint URL.

properties.name: app.pinecone.api-key
properties.description: Pinecone API key used by the Java SDK.

properties.name: app.pinecone.namespace
properties.description: Pinecone namespace used for vector upserts and queries.

properties.name: app.processing.tmp-dir
properties.description: Local working directory for downloaded videos and extracted artifacts.

properties.name: app.processing.ffmpeg.command
properties.description: FFmpeg executable name or absolute path.
